selection.rule: Behavior may bias probability by at most ±30%; it never selects weather directly.

omen.visual: Packet lines pause in place; three distant points fail to refresh.
omen.audio: Sparse unreadable notification chirps lose their high partials.

burst.visual: Short horizontal dropouts delete portions of façades without moving collision.
burst.audio: Band-limited digital grain with irregular missing blocks.

aftermath.visual: Stale packets remain one refresh behind.

omen.visual: A few short vertical lines appear between player and architecture.
omen.audio: Three dry ticks with widening stereo distance.

burst.visual: World-space rain lines cross depth planes; no screen overlay.
burst.audio: Sparse impulse rain, no naturalistic field recording.

aftermath.visual: Small binary puddles repeat the room's last characters.

omen.visual: One heavy fleck falls upward before gravity is established.
omen.audio: A low granular exhale with no attack transient.

burst.visual: Irregular square flecks settle on geometry and player route.
burst.audio: Soft low-passed grains derived from acrylic scrape impulses.

aftermath.visual: Deposits outline recent movement before dissolving.

omen.visual: Cables tense one beat before particles move.
omen.audio: A narrow filtered band pans in the future wind direction.

burst.visual: Cables, witnesses, characters and hard shadows displace at different response rates.
burst.audio: Two asynchronous filtered noise bands; no continuous whoosh.

aftermath.visual: One shadow and one cable return late, proving different material inertia.

omen.visual: Witnesses face upward; a hard ink disk enters outside the Eye's center.
omen.audio: Room fundamentals descend continuously by a minor third.

burst.visual: Day collapses toward ink. If flower intensity is high enough, witnesses face the player instead of the Eye.
burst.audio: Room bed is retained at half speed beneath a dry two-tone clock.

aftermath.visual: One building retains inverted material and one witness keeps its last facing.

accessibility.reducedMotion: Use phase boundary poses; keep gameplayClock durations and all event times.
accessibility.reduceFlash: STATIC dropout uses spatial deletion without luminance inversion; ECLIPSE hard cut uses a 400ms non-flashing threshold crawl.
accessibility.audio: Every omen has a spatial visual counterpart; every visual-only phase is reflected by UI weather state text when descriptions are enabled.

invariants: Weather cannot move bullets, hitboxes, safe lanes or player collision.
Each type has a distinct omen, burst, aftermath and material residue.
No weather type is selected as a reward or punishment.
